headline: Domino's (DPZ) Is Down 8.2% After Softer Sales, Lower Outlook and $1 Billion Buyback - What's Changed
summary: In late April 2026, Domino's Pizza, Inc. reported first‑quarter revenue of US$1,150.59 million, up from US$1,112.06 million a year earlier, while net income slipped to US$139.81 million and diluted EPS from continuing operations eased to US$4.13. Alongside weaker‑than‑expected U.S. same‑store sales and a reduced full‑year sales outlook, Domino’s announced a new US$1.00 billion share repurchase program and affirmed its quarterly dividend. We’ll now examine how the softer same‑store sales and...
